description: Stores product line categories referenced by the products table via productLine
Contains all scale model products each belonging to a productline and referenced by orderdetails via productCode
Holds company office locations worldwide referenced by the employees table via officeCode
Stores employee records with a self-referential hierarchy and linked to offices via officeCode and referenced by customers via salesRepEmployeeNumber
Contains customer account info linked to employees via salesRepEmployeeNumber and referenced by orders and payments via customerNumber
Records sales orders placed by customers linked via customerNumber and its line items stored in orderdetails
Junction table linking orders and products via orderNumber and productCode as a composite primary key
Records customer payments linked to customers via customerNumber with checkNumber forming a composite primary key
